JUDGE D BALLATI; RPTR S LEE; CLK C CARSWELL COURT CONVENES TO CONTINUE JURY SELECTION. PLTFS POPOV AND SHNAYDERMAN ARE PRESENT W ATNY LIBERTY. DEFT ALAMO IS PRESENT BY ATNY ALLEN. THESE TWO ALTERNATE JURORS ARE SWORN: LAWLER AND BATTAD. SEVERAL MOTIONS ARE FILED AND HEARD ON THE RECORD. BOTH SIDES MAKE OPENING STATEMENTS. PLTF PRESENTS BOTH ORAL & DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE.JURORS ARE ADMONISHED NOT TO DISCUSS CASE, FORM OPINIONS, INVESTIGATE AND ARE ORDERED TO RETURN 9:00AM ON 4/25/96.

ALLEN.PROSPECTIVE JURORS ARE GIVEN QUALIFICATION ACKNOWLEDGMENT AFTER ROLL CALL IS TAKEN. PROSP JURORS ARE CALLED AND VOIR DIRED BY THE COURT AND VOIR DIRE IS BEGUN BY PLTF COUNSEL. PROSP JURORS ARE ADMONISHED NOT TO DISCUSS THE CASE AND NOT TO VISIT THE SCENE OR INVESTIGATE AND ARE ORDERED OR RETURN 4/24/96 AT 9:30AM FOR CONTD JURY SELECTION.

BENJAMIN SCHMINKE DISMISSED FROM THIS ACTION BY THE COURT.

JUDGE D BALLATI; RPTR S LEE; CLK C CARSWELL COURT CONVENES FOR FURTHER JURY TRIAL. BOTH PLTFS PRESENT W COUNSEL LIBERTY. DEFT PRESENT BY ATNY J ALLEN AND LARRY REBACK. 12 JURORS AND 1 ALTERNATE PRESENT. ALL EXHIBITS ARE ENTERED INTO EVIDENCE. BOTH SIDES MAKE CLOSING ARGUMENTS. COURT INSTRUCTS THE JURY AND PROPOSED JURY INSTRUCTIONS NOT GIVEN ARE FILED. THE BAILIFF IS SWORN AND TAKES THE JURY AND EVIDENCE, INSTRUCTIONS AND SPECIAL VERDICT FORM TO THE JURY ROOM TO DELIBERATE. ALT JUROR REMAINS ON STANDBY. A VERDICT IS REACHED, JURY RETURNED TO COURTROOM, ALT JUROR RETURNED TO COURTROOM. THE VERDICT IS READ. THE JURY IS POLLED. THE VERDICT IS RECORDED. THE JURY FINDS FOR THE PLTFS AND AGAINST THE DEFT AND AWARDS TO PLTF SHNAYDERMAN DAMAGES IN THE AMOUNT OF $1206.50 AND TO PLTF POPOV IN THE AMOUNT OF $389. THE JURY ADMONISHMENT IS LIFTED. THE JURORS ARE THANKED AND RELEASED. THE EXHIBITS ARE RETAINED. THE PLTF WILL PREPARE THE JUDGMENT.
